name: Vermicelli with Meat Sauce and Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 35 oz Can Italian Plum Tomatoes, undrained
1/4 cup Fresh Basil, chopped -or- 2 tbsp Dried Basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté until softened.
2. Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned and broken up into small pieces.
3. Stir in the Italian plum tomatoes (undrained) and tomato paste. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes.
4. Season with salt, pepper, sugar, and basil. Let the sauce simmer gently for about 15-20 minutes.
5. Just before serving, stir in the crumbled feta cheese. Serve hot over cooked Vermicelli noodles.
